learning.priority_boost_type: High priority based on your preferences

actions.import_confirm: Are you sure you want to import this device?

types.new_device_available_description: A new entity "{{friendlyName}}" is available in Home Assistant.
types.device_missing_room_description: The device "{{deviceName}}" needs to be assigned to a room for better organization.
types.device_name_technical_description: The device "{{deviceName}}" has a technical name. We suggest renaming it to something more human-readable.
types.device_name_duplicate_description: Multiple devices share the name "{{deviceName}}". This can cause confusion in voice control.
types.automation_suggestion_description: We suggest creating an automation based on your usage patterns: {{description}}
types.scene_suggestion_description: We suggest creating a scene for {{roomName}}: {{description}}
types.energy_waste_detected_description: The device {{deviceName}} has been ON for over {{hoursOn}} hours without recent activity.
types.habit_pattern_detected_description: A recurring usage pattern has been detected for {{deviceName}} around {{timeWindow}}.
types.optimization_opportunity_description: The device {{deviceName}} in {{roomName}} has not been used in the last {{daysInactive}} days.

conversation.title: Talk to my Home
conversation.subtitle: Local residential operator with natural control
conversation.placeholder: Tell me something, e.g. what lights are on?
conversation.voice_not_understood: I do not have a clear read. Try saying: turn off the living room light
conversation.voice_unavailable_error: Open HomePilot from localhost or HTTPS to use the microphone
conversation.empty_description: You can ask about the state of your home or ask me to perform actions for you.
conversation.options_question: Which one do you want to control?
conversation.empty_chat_description: I can read home status, control devices, and run scenes through natural commands. Sensitive actions are always confirmed before proceeding.
conversation.suggestion_3: Turn off the living room lights

dashboard.no_favorite_scenes_hint: Mark a scene as favorite to show it here as a quick action.
dashboard.no_favorite_automations_hint: Mark an automation as favorite to show it here.

inspector.delete_failed: The device could not be removed. It may still be used by a scene or automation.

actions.unassign_confirm: Are you sure you want to remove this device from its current room? You will be able to reassign it later from the unassigned section.

inspector.edge_node_info: Certified for autonomous execution. Commands are processed directly on this node without external bridges.

builder.scene_info: Executing a scene will apply a set of pre-configured unit states.

errors.sync_failed: The automation could not be saved

placeholders.name: e.g. Welcome Home or Movie Night

device_states.device_unavailable_hint: Home Assistant no longer reports this entity. You can refresh it, remove the local import, or wait for it to return; it will update automatically when recovered.

camera.snapshot_hint: Expanded view with periodic updates · Press Escape to close
camera.fullscreen_hint: Expanded camera view · Press Escape to close

native_cameras.title: Local IP Cameras
native_cameras.subtitle: Manage native IP cameras directly from HomePilot without depending on Home Assistant.
native_cameras.empty_description: Add your first local IP camera. HomePilot will connect directly via RTSP and manage the stream securely.

source_type_hints.onvif-ptz: Uses ONVIF to negotiate the video profile and prepares PTZ cameras for local control.
source_type_hints.rtsp-dvr: Uses a direct RTSP path from the DVR. Ideal for Hikvision, Dahua, or NVR channels.
source_type_hints.sonoff-rtsp: Uses the local RTSP stream exposed by compatible Sonoff cameras.

discovery.title: Add native camera
discovery.subtitle: Choose the integration type. HomePilot will discover ONVIF when the protocol supports it; RTSP/DVR and Sonoff are configured with their local URL.
discovery.detected_by_onvif: detected by ONVIF to prefill IP

profile_hints.onvif-ptz: Discover on the network or manually configure an ONVIF/PTZ camera.
profile_hints.rtsp-dvr: Add a DVR/NVR channel using host, port, and RTSP path.
profile_hints.sonoff-rtsp: Add a Sonoff camera that exposes local RTSP.

manual_profile_notes.rtsp-dvr: RTSP/DVR has no universal discovery. You can select a detected DVR to prefill the IP; the recommended RTSP port will be 554.
manual_profile_notes.sonoff-rtsp: Sonoff is configured through local RTSP. You can select a detected camera to prefill the IP and adjust the path if your model uses a different one.

manual_rtsp_hints.rtsp-dvr: Use this option if you know the DVR IP or if it does not appear in the list.
manual_rtsp_hints.sonoff-rtsp: Use this option if you know the Sonoff camera IP or if it does not appear in the list.

native_cameras.delete_confirm_description: The camera and its configuration will be deleted. The stream will stop being available immediately.
native_cameras.security_note: Credentials are stored locally in HomePilot and never exposed in the browser.

form.subtitle: Configure a direct RTSP connection to your IP camera
form.field_rtsp_port_hint: Usually 554. Port 80 is normally HTTP/ONVIF, not RTSP.

field_host_hints.onvif-ptz: ONVIF camera IP or host. HomePilot will negotiate the video profile automatically.
field_host_hints.rtsp-dvr: DVR/NVR IP or host. Use the real RTSP port of the device, usually 554.
field_host_hints.sonoff-rtsp: Local IP of the Sonoff camera with RTSP enabled.

field_rtsp_path_hints.onvif-ptz: HomePilot gets this path from ONVIF when the device exposes it.
field_rtsp_path_hints.rtsp-dvr: Required for DVR/NVR. Common examples: /Streaming/Channels/101, /cam/realmonitor?channel=1&subtype=0, or /live/ch00_0.
field_rtsp_path_hints.sonoff-rtsp: Required for Sonoff RTSP. Adjust it if your model uses a different path.

errors.port_invalid: Port must be a number between 1 and 65535
errors.rtsp_path_required: The RTSP path is required for RTSP/DVR and Sonoff.

messages.already_exists: This camera already exists in HomePilot.

audit_logs.empty_description: No auditable events have been generated on this Edge yet. Perform actions like assigning devices or running commands to see technical activity here.

messages.USER_SESSIONS_REVOKED: All sessions for '{{targetUser}}' have been revoked

header.title: Active Edge Directory
header.subtitle: Manage organizational access and session boundaries.

users.protection_rule: System Protection Rule: HomePilot requires at least one active Admin user. Deactivating or demoting the last administrator is strictly prohibited by backend security logic to prevent permanent lockout.

actions.confirm_suspend: WARNING: Are you sure you want to SUSPEND this user? Suspension instantly kills all active sessions.
actions.confirm_restore: Are you sure you want to RESTORE this user?
actions.confirm_role: Confirm ROLE CHANGE for "{{username}}"? Elevating or demoting accounts affects system-wide permissions.
actions.confirm_revoke: EMERGENCY: Force logout "{{username}}" and invalidate all active session tokens immediately?

password_reset.title: New password for {{username}}
password_reset.description: The new password replaces the previous one and signs this account out of every active session.
password_reset.error: The password could not be reset

profile.title: My Profile
profile.avatar_hint: Click the photo to change it. It gets saved locally on the MiniPC.
profile.avatar_error: Could not process image. Please try another.
profile.display_name_hint: If left empty, your username will be displayed.

login.title: HomePilot
login.subtitle: Sign in to access Operator Console
login.error_failed: Login failed. Please verify your credentials.

onboarding.title: Activate HomePilot
onboarding.subtitle: Connect the appliance to Home Assistant and prepare the console for local-network operation.

side.title: Delivery criteria
side.local: Local control is validated before opening the workspace.
side.secure: The token is protected and used only to bind the bridge.
side.recoverable: The system can be revalidated from settings if Home Assistant changes.

step1.title: System Diagnostic
step1.description: We validate identity, configuration, and connectivity before activating the environment.
step1.operator_note: Activation requires an active administrator. If Home Assistant is not configured yet, the next step prepares the bridge and tests the live connection.

step2.title: Home Assistant Core
step2.description: Enter the URL reachable from Docker or the local network and a long-lived access token.
step2.docker_hint: Running in Docker? Use http://homeassistant:8123 for internal network access.
step2.token_help_1: 1. In Home Assistant, open your user profile.
step2.token_help_2: 2. Create a long-lived access token for HomePilot.
step2.token_help_3: 3. Paste it here, test the connection, and save only after the bridge responds.

step3.title: System Ready
step3.subtitle: Your HomePilot appliance is configured and securely bonded with your Home Assistant network.

change_password.title: Change Password
change_password.subtitle: Your active sessions will be revoked.
change_password.success_message:
Password updated successfully.
Please log in again.
change_password.error_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
change_password.error_failed: Incorrect current password or server error

system.unreachable_msg: The Edge Controller is unreachable. Check power and network.

showcase.hero_description: HomePilot logic and critical hardware function independently of external networks. This environment is optimized for reliability, privacy, and low-latency execution.
showcase.hardware_note: Native devices benefit from cryptographic pairing and direct-to-hardware execution within the local cluster.
showcase.intelligence_note: All autonomous logic is evaluated locally by the HomePilot core, ensuring functionality during internet partitions.

energy.title: Energy Awareness
energy.subtitle: Know where energy goes and where to save.
energy.empty_description: HomePilot will surface consumption patterns, idle devices, and savings opportunities from your local device data.
energy.feature_consumption: Live consumption by room and device
energy.feature_savings: Savings suggestions from your usage patterns
energy.powered_by_local: Powered by local edge data only
energy.insight_hint: The Assistant already surfaces energy waste in real time. Energy view will consolidate this into a full picture.
energy.no_data: No energy data available from Home Assistant

dashboards.title: Dashboards
dashboards.intro_subtitle: Personalized control surfaces for every context.
dashboards.empty_description: Create personalized dashboards with the devices, rooms, and insights that matter to you.
dashboards.empty_value_hint: Combine any devices, rooms, and automations into a focused personal view.
dashboards.tabs_hint: Tabs let you organize your dashboard into distinct sections.
dashboards.delete_tab_confirm: Delete this tab and all its widgets?
dashboards.delete_dashboard_description: The dashboard “{{title}}” and all of its tabs and widgets will be deleted.
dashboards.widgets_empty: This tab is empty. Add your first widget below.
dashboards.error_create: The dashboard could not be created
dashboards.error_save: Dashboard changes could not be saved
dashboards.error_delete: The dashboard could not be deleted
dashboards.widgets_empty_hint: Start editing to choose and configure the first widget on this tab.

view_config.visibility_hint: Select which users should see this view in navigation

room_summary.label: Room Summary
room_summary.placeholder: Link it to a room to control the entire space.

selected_device.placeholder: Link it to a light or switch to take control.

scenes_shortcut.label: Scene Shortcut
scenes_shortcut.placeholder: Link it to a custom scene to launch it with a tap.

assistant_insights.label: Assistant Insights
assistant_insights.no_findings_desc: No pending findings in the system.

energy_insight.label: Energy Insight
energy_insight.placeholder: No energy entities (W/kWh) detected in Home Assistant.

activity_feed.label: Activity
activity_feed.placeholder: No events recorded in the system at this time.

system_status.label: System
system_status.placeholder: Could not fetch HomePilot server diagnostics.

inspector.title: Widget Inspector
inspector.auto_monitor_desc: This widget automatically detects energy entities in your system. No manual binding required.
inspector.custom_title_hint: This name will be shown in the widget header if layout allows.

dashboard.title: Your Home, One Control Layer
dashboard.description: HomePilot brings spaces, scenes, devices, and system health into one local console, designed to operate the home without jumping between apps.

scenes.title: Scenes Ready to Execute
scenes.description: Scenes group commands across devices. HomePilot shows how many endpoints each scene touches and whether it can run with local resilience.

conversation.title: Talk to Your Home
conversation.description: The assistant understands natural commands, responds with local voice, and keeps safe confirmations for sensitive actions while the console is open.

automations.title: Your Home Thinks For You
automations.description: Rules turn schedules, states, and scenes into automatic actions. The console distinguishes what runs on Edge from what depends on external services.

resilience.title: Built for Real-World Reliability
resilience.description: The resilience showcase confirms which parts of the home continue operating without internet, so the system is dependable when it matters most.
